message:
feat(wizard): add hostname verification and enhance wizard pages

- Add post-SSH-connection hostname verification section to help users
  confirm they're controlling the VPS, not their local machine
- Enhance launch-onboarding page with additional guidance
- Enhance reconnect-ubuntu page with additional content

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@ "use client"; import { useEffect } from "react"; -import { PartyPopper, BookOpen, ExternalLink, Sparkles, ArrowRight, GraduationCap, Terminal, RefreshCw } from "lucide-react"; +import { PartyPopper, BookOpen, ExternalLink, Sparkles, ArrowRight, GraduationCap, Terminal, RefreshCw, FolderPlus } from "lucide-react"; import { Card } from "@/components/ui/card"; import { CommandCard } from "@/components/command-card"; import { markStepComplete, setCompletedSteps, TOTAL_STEPS } from "@/lib/wizardSteps"; @@ -246,6 +246,50 @@ export default function LaunchOnboardingPage() { + {/* Starting a New Project - How to begin real work */} + +
+
+ +

Starting a New Project

+
+

+ Ready to build something? Here's the pattern: +

+
+ +
+
+

1. Create a session for your project

+ +

+ This creates a persistent workspace named "my-awesome-app". +

+
+ +
+

2. Create and navigate to a project folder

+ +
+ +
+

3. Start Claude and describe your project

+ +

+ Tell Claude what you want to build. For example: +

+
+ "Create a React app with TypeScript that shows a todo list" +
+
+ + + Claude will set up the project structure, install dependencies, and start + building. You can guide it step by step or give it the whole vision at once. + +
+ + {/* Your First 5 Minutes */}

@@ -256,6 +256,29 @@ export default function SSHConnectPage() {

+ {/* Post-connection verification */} +
+

Verify you're on the VPS

+

+ Try this command to confirm you're controlling the VPS, not your laptop: +

+ + +

vps-12345

+

+ (Your VPS hostname — not your laptop's name like "MacBook-Pro" or "DESKTOP-ABC123") +

+ + + You're now remote-controlling the VPS! Everything you type happens on the VPS. + If you type ls, you see VPS files. + If you install something, it installs on the VPS. Your laptop is just the remote control. + +
+ {/* Troubleshooting */}

Having trouble?
